Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ExternalServiceRegistration

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ExternalServiceRegistration
public class ExternalServiceRegistration extends Metadata

Java class for ExternalServiceRegistration complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ExternalServiceRegistration">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="namedCredential" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="namedCredentialReference" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="operations" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ExternalServiceOperation" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="providerAssetEndpoint" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="registrationProviderType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ExternalServiceRegistrationProviderType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schema" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schemaAbsoluteUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schemaType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schemaUploadFileExtension" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schemaUploadFileName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schemaUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="serviceBinding" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="status" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="systemVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getOperations

      public List<ExternalServiceOperation> getOperations()
      Gets the value of the operations property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the operations property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getOperations().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ExternalServiceOperation

      Returns:
      The value of the operations property.
